instructions.notes: Top-level autonomous execution and verification guidance applies.
T01 is intake/source-lock only; product code implementation and service startup are forbidden.
The auto-execute package is an execution entry point, not a final product completion report.

primarySpecs.lockedDecision: Web/H5 is the main product, main engineering project, and main acceptance surface. Mini-program is a later validation entry using the unified API.
AuraCue P0 is an anonymous daily aura activation flow with optional upload, draw, generated card, activation, save, share, and unified API/DB backing.

uiSources.lockedDecision: Only P0-prefixed mini-program references drive P0 visual direction; legacy unlock/payment/invite/profile/trend/P1 references are demoted and must not drive P0.
P0 visual references cover Mood, Context, Outfit, Draw, Reveal, Result, Activate, Activated, Share, Saved, and Error states.

evidence: apps/web/package.json exists with Next.js, React, Prisma, lint, build, test, and typecheck scripts.
apps/web/app contains all nine required P0 route page.tsx placeholders.
appsWeb.remainingGap: Routes are scaffold placeholders; no final product PASS is claimed by T01.

appsWebApiV1.impact: Downstream API implementation remains required; no route.ts handlers were found under apps/web/app/api/v1.

evidence: Schema includes AnonymousUser, OutfitUpload, DrawSession, GenerationJob, AuraCard, AuraActivation, SavedCard, ShareEvent, AnalyticsEvent, and CardTemplate.
apps/web/tests/db-readback.test.mjs exists and targets local SQLite readback evidence.
appsWebDb.remainingGap: Root prisma/schema.prisma is absent and the current app-local datasource is SQLite, while the Web-first spec names PostgreSQL + Prisma as the production source of truth.

notReusableAsIs: in-memory/local repository as final DB source

appsWechatMini.boundary: Not the Web v1.0 implementation source; after Web PASS, mini-program should call the unified /api/v1/* and avoid duplicated prompt, AI, renderer, activation, payment, or invite business logic.

packages.reuse: Types/enums/type guard starting point; must be reconciled with Web-first API contracts.
Visual token starting point for Web UI.
Local 9:16 share-card render concept; must fit Web-first renderer contract.
Prompt/mock generator/safety guard concepts; frontends must not call AI directly.

lockedWebMainline.dbCandidate: PostgreSQL + Prisma for production contract; current repaired repo has app-local SQLite Prisma scaffold for local evidence
lockedWebMainline.aiCandidate: mock provider by default; OpenAI-compatible adapter optional
lockedWebMainline.storageBoundary: Web localStorage only for temporary draft/anonymousId; API/DB is source of truth for card/activation data.
lockedWebMainline.uploadBoundary: Outfit upload is optional and skippable; failure must not block the flow.
lockedWebMainline.paymentBoundary: Real payment, WeChat Pay, paywall, unlock/payment/invite are not Web P0.
lockedWebMainline.legacyMiniProgramBoundary: Mini-program is non-primary for this phase and must not pull legacy unlock/payment/invite into Web P0.

downstreamPendingWork.evidence: No apps/web/app/api/v1 route handlers were found.
downstreamPendingWork.nextRepair: T04-T07 implement unified /api/v1/* route handlers under apps/web/app/api/v1.

downstreamPendingWork.evidence: apps/web/tests/smoke-routes.test.mjs expects route pages to use RoutePlaceholder.
downstreamPendingWork.nextRepair: T08-T11 replace placeholder route surfaces with real Web P0 flows and visual evidence.

downstreamPendingWork.evidence: apps/web/prisma/schema.prisma uses a SQLite datasource; root prisma/schema.prisma is absent.
downstreamPendingWork.nextRepair: Later backend/DB repair should decide whether to preserve local SQLite evidence mode, add PostgreSQL deployment config, or move/copy the canonical Prisma schema to the expected root path.

downstreamPendingWork.evidence: T01 did not start services, click pages, run API transcripts, or produce screenshots by design.
downstreamPendingWork.nextRepair: T12-T16 add API/DB contract tests, smoke, owner click E2E, visual compare, and final gate evidence.

commands: git status --short -- docs/auto-execute/results/web/T01.json docs/auto-execute/latest/web/T01-HANDOFF.md docs/auto-execute/logs/web/T01-intake-command-log.md apps/web prisma docs/auto-execute

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='docs/auto-execute/results/web/T01.json'; const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); console.log(JSON.stringify({parsed:true, verdict:j.verdict, productPassClaim:j.productPassClaim, blockers:j.blockers.length, downstreamPendingWork:j.downstreamPendingWork.length}, null, 2));"

evidence.notes: Node JSON.parse succeeded and reported verdict PASS, productPassClaim false, blockers 0, downstreamPendingWork 4.

nextRepair: T04-T07: implement /api/v1/* route handlers under apps/web/app/api/v1 and connect them to the Web-first contracts.
T08-T11: replace the current placeholder Web route pages with real P0 flow pages using the P0 visual references.
Resolve DB deployment alignment: the current app-local Prisma schema is SQLite for local evidence; production contract still requires PostgreSQL + Prisma.
T12-T16: run API/DB/e2e/visual/final gate evidence before any product PASS claim.

completedBeforeThisRerun: T03-style app-local Prisma schema and DB readback test now exist.
rerunResumeState.reason: T01 intake/source-lock artifacts are complete and refreshed against current repo state; downstream implementation remains outside T01 scope.
